ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "cc_num" TEXT /* Credit card number associated with the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the states table */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the jobs table */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the transaction category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the states table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the cities table */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the categories table */,
  "amount" REAL /* Transaction amount */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction amount */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the transaction (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used for the transaction (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the transactions table */,
  "interval" TEXT /* Time interval for the frequency (e.g., past 5 minutes, past 30 minutes) */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of transactions in the given interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_frequencies_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the transactions table */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_feedback_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the transactions table */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the transactions table */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the marketing campaigns table */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Promotion code applied to the transaction */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_promotions_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_promotions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the transactions table */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics metric (e.g., click-through rate, conversion rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the analytics metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_analytics_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the transactions table */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile, tablet) */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "browsers" (
  "browser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each browser record */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the transactions table */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used (e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari) */,
  "browser_version" TEXT /* Version of the browser used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("browser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_browsers_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
